data.body: Both remaining workstreams delivered and their stories closed+signed: WS-EVAL-EXISTING (rink-cloud-gum) and WS-DOC (seek-ditch-corgi). WS-VISUAL-EVAL split to epic yip-gem-teak (out of scope). Engine/migration/cleanup/visual/prompts/intent-align were already done via closed sibling epics A/B/e6d9. Code shipped on branch feat/ws-eval-existing-6f2d (PR #62), rebased onto current main, full mypy/ruff/tests green, live path smoke-validated. Closing the epic.
